stories.original_headline: Just two days of oatmeal cut bad cholesterol by 10%
stories.original_summary: Eating nothing but oatmeal for just two days might sound extreme, but it delivered a striking payoff in a new clinical trial. People with metabolic syndrome who followed a short, calorie-reduced oat-based plan saw their harmful LDL cholesterol drop by 10%, along with modest weight loss and lower blo
stories.fantasy_headline: Oat Porridge Charm Reduces Unhealthy Humors!
stories.fantasy_story: The Healing Guild has found a simple, powerful remedy! Eating only hearty oat porridge for two sunrises and sunsets can lessen the unhealthy humors within a body by a tenth. Many townsfolk suffering from common ailments have also found themselves with slighter frames and more vigor after this easy regimen.

stories.original_headline: NASA study finds ancient life could survive 50 million years in Martian ice
stories.original_summary: Mars’ frozen ice caps may be time capsules for ancient life. Lab experiments show that key building blocks of proteins can survive tens of millions of years in pure ice, even under relentless cosmic radiation. Ice mixed with Martian-like soil, however, destroys organic material far more quickly. The
stories.fantasy_headline: Ancient Life's Secrets Hidden in Faraway Ice!
stories.fantasy_story: The Grand Order of Stargazers has made an astounding discovery from their observations of the Red Wanderer! They believe that pure, ancient ice from distant realms could preserve the vital essences of old life for eons, even against the ethereal rays of the cosmos. However, when mixed with soil, these essences vanish far more swiftly.

stories.original_headline: How the new Galaxy S26 phones compare
stories.original_summary: Samsung has just announced its new Galaxy S26 lineup, which includes the S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra. While they aren't radical departures from last year's models, they bring a handful of notable upgrades. All three run on Qualcomm's Galaxy-centric Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5, which delivers improved
stories.fantasy_headline: Stellar Smiths Unveil New Whispering Orbs!
stories.fantasy_story: The esteemed Stellar Smiths Guild has revealed their latest array of Crystal Scrying Orbs: the 'Astral,' the 'Cosmic,' and the 'Celestial' models. While not vastly different from last year's designs, these new artifacts possess improved enchantments. Each orb is powered by a potent elemental spirit, granting them swifter visions and clearer distant communication.
